info.title: Kubeasy CLI API
info.description: API consumed by the `kubeasy` CLI. Authentication uses a Bearer API key obtained via `kubeasy login`.

422.description: Some objectives failed or missing/unknown objectives

ObjectiveType.description: Type of objective validation. Determines which spec fields are required.

Objective.description: A single objective definition as it appears in `challenge.yaml`

ObjectiveSpec.description: Union of all possible objective spec shapes. The actual shape depends on the objective `type`.

Target.description: Kubernetes resource target — identifies which resources to check

StatusSpec.description: Spec for `type: status` objectives — checks resource status fields

ConditionCheck.description: A single Kubernetes condition check (type/status pair)

ConditionSpec.description: Spec for `type: condition` objectives — checks Kubernetes conditions

LogSpec.description: Spec for `type: log` objectives — searches container logs for expected strings

EventSpec.description: Spec for `type: event` objectives — detects forbidden Kubernetes events

SourcePod.description: Source pod for connectivity checks (identified by name or label selector)

ConnectivitySpec.description: Spec for `type: connectivity` objectives — tests HTTP connectivity from a pod

CliMetadata.description: CLI metadata sent with tracking requests

ObjectiveResult.description: Result from a single objective validation

SubmitBody.description: Challenge submission payload sent by the CLI

ScoredObjective.description: Enriched objective result stored after submission
